title: lingoum esculentum
intro: Lingoum esculentum, also known as the Poria mushroom or Fuling, is a type of edible fungus that belongs to the family Polyporaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Lingoum esculentum include improved digestion, reduced blood pressure, and enhanced immune function. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried slices, decoctions, and capsules, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
